## Summary

Describe the change briefly.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI / security
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build`
- [ ] `dotnet test`
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes`
- [ ] Manual UI check if relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated if relevant

## Security and privacy checklist

- [ ] No secrets
- [ ] No real recruiter data
- [ ] No real CV files
- [ ] No personal screenshots
- [ ] No scraping or automated outbound messaging added

## Notes

Add any trade-offs, follow-up tasks, or screenshots.
